sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n86980" key="prodiakeno/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">προδια-κενόω</orth>, <sense id="n86980.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">evacuate completely first,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0718.tlg008:50" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aët.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">8.50</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
